Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class SemisequentChangeInfo

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.SemisequentChangeInfo
public class SemisequentChangeInfo extends Object
Records the changes made to a semisequent. Keeps track of added and removed formula to the semisequents.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Method
    Description
    void
    addedFormula(int idx, SequentFormula cf)

    ImmutableList<SequentFormula>

    returns the list of all added constrained formulas

    This method combines this change information from this info and its successor.
    SemisequentChangeInfo

    ImmutableList<SequentFormula>

    returns the list of constrained formula of the new semisequent

    returns true if the semisequent has changed

    adding formula f to the semisequent failed due to a redundance check.

    returns a list of formulas that have been tried to add to the semisequent but got rejected as they were redundant

    logs an added formula at position idx

    returns the list of all removed constrained formulas

    returns the semisequent that is the result of the change operation

  • Method Details

    • copy

      public SemisequentChangeInfo copy()

    • hasChanged

      public boolean hasChanged()
      returns true if the semisequent has changed

    • setFormulaList

      public void setFormulaList(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> list)
      sets the list of constrained formula containing all formulas of the semisequent after the operation

    • getFormulaList

      public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> getFormulaList()
      returns the list of constrained formula of the new semisequent

    • addedFormula

      public void addedFormula(int idx, SequentFormula cf)
      logs an added formula at position idx

    • modifiedFormula

      public void modifiedFormula(int idx, FormulaChangeInfo fci)
      logs a modified formula at position idx

    • addedFormulas

      public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> addedFormulas()
      returns the list of all added constrained formulas
      Returns:
      IList added to the semisequent

    • removedFormulas

      public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> removedFormulas()
      returns the list of all removed constrained formulas
      Returns:
      IList removed from the semisequent

    • rejectedFormulas

      public ImmutableList<SequentFormula> rejectedFormulas()
      returns a list of formulas that have been tried to add to the semisequent but got rejected as they were redundant
      Returns:
      list of formulas rejected due to redundancy

    • rejectedFormula

      public void rejectedFormula(SequentFormula f)
      adding formula f to the semisequent failed due to a redundance check. This means an equal or stronger formula is already present in the semisequent
      Parameters:
      f - the SequentFormula

    • modifiedFormulas

      public ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> modifiedFormulas()
      returns the list of all modification positions
      Returns:
      IList modified within the semisequent

    • removedFormula

      public void removedFormula(int idx, SequentFormula cf)
      logs an added formula at position idx

    • combine

      public void combine(SemisequentChangeInfo succ)
      This method combines this change information from this info and its successor. ATTENTION: it takes over ownership over succ and does not release it. This means when invoking the method it must be snsured that succ is never used afterwards.
      Parameters:
      succ - the SemisequentChangeInfo to combine with

    • getIndex

      public int getIndex()
      returns the index of the last added formula

    • semisequent

      public Semisequent semisequent()
      returns the semisequent that is the result of the change operation

      public String toString()
      toString
